ordered_events.detail: Sets his rifle on the embankment without rising
ordered_events.quote: sets his rifle on the embankment without rising

ordered_events.detail: Wipes mud from his lock, eyes the slope above
ordered_events.quote: wipes mud from his lock and eyes the slope

ordered_events.detail: Warns the ditch is shallow and exposed
ordered_events.quote: bad ditch. Shallow. The wolf does not sleep

ordered_events.detail: Spits toward the open ground
ordered_events.quote: spits toward the open ground

ordered_events.detail: Returns from the edge and lays rifle across earthwork
ordered_events.quote: lays his rifle across the earthwork

ordered_events.detail: Reports Karganov's militia on both sides of the clump
ordered_events.quote: Karganov. Militia. Both sides of the clump.

ordered_events.detail: Slides a powder pouch to Hadji Murad's hand
ordered_events.quote: slides a powder pouch toward Hadji Murad's hand

ordered_events.detail: Reports powder dry, forty rounds, and the dagger ready
ordered_events.quote: Powder dry. Forty rounds, agha — and the dagger.

ordered_events.detail: Cuts a branch with his dagger, lays it on the bank
ordered_events.quote: cuts a branch with his dagger, lays it on the bank

ordered_events.detail: Orders three men to dig the ditch deeper
ordered_events.quote: dig deeper. A handful of earth is worth a brother

ordered_events.detail: Reins in twenty paces off the ditch, stays mounted
ordered_events.quote: reins in twenty paces off

ordered_events.detail: Lowers his rifle a finger's width, looks across
ordered_events.quote: lowers his rifle a finger's width. Looks across

ordered_events.detail: Reminds Hadji Aga he once ate from his dish
ordered_events.quote: Once you ate from my dish. Today you bring two hundred guns

ordered_events.detail: Turns his head toward Karganov's line
ordered_events.quote: turns his head a fraction toward the open ground

ordered_events.detail: Challenges Karganov to come closer and count again
ordered_events.quote: Karganov. You are many. We are six. Come closer and count again.

ordered_events.detail: Nods toward the clearing edge at the black mare
ordered_events.quote: nods once toward the clearing edge

ordered_events.detail: Orders Bata to send the black mare out first
ordered_events.quote: the black mare first. A horse without a rider tells the militia

ordered_events.detail: Tightens his belt, does not look back
ordered_events.quote: tightens his belt. Does not look back

ordered_events.detail: Says his horse will walk home alone and proud
ordered_events.quote: she walks home alone, she walks proud

ordered_events.detail: Climbs to the bank
ordered_events.quote: He climbs to the bank

ordered_events.detail: Shot while climbing the bank, dies instantly
ordered_events.quote: A shot cracks. Bata pitches into the mud. Still.

ordered_events.detail: Half-rises from the ditch, dagger half-drawn
ordered_events.quote: half-rises from the ditch, dagger half-drawn

ordered_events.detail: Warns it is Akhmet Khan on the ridge
ordered_events.quote: It is Akhmet Khan. He rode at your stirrup once.

ordered_events.detail: Orders Khanefi to reload, tells Eldar to sit
ordered_events.quote: Eldar, sit. A dagger is for the last step, not the first.

ordered_events.detail: Settles, plants a knee against the earth wall
ordered_events.quote: settles. Plants a knee against the earth wall

ordered_events.detail: Fires, lowers the smoking rifle, spits
ordered_events.quote: fires, lowers the smoking rifle, spits

ordered_events.detail: Reports a boy crawling the bushes toward them
ordered_events.quote: The boy is here, agha. Crawling the bushes himself.

ordered_events.detail: Marks one shrub with his eyes, then the next
ordered_events.quote: marks one shrub with his eyes, then the next

ordered_events.detail: Says he knew the boy's father, will meet the son soon
ordered_events.quote: The son I will meet soon enough.

ordered_events.detail: Shifts nearer to Hadji Murad, thumbs a fresh cartridge
ordered_events.quote: shifts one pace nearer to Hadji Murad

ordered_events.detail: Says the shrubs do half the work, ready to act
ordered_events.quote: Let them come. The shrubs do half the work.

ordered_events.detail: Glances once at the dying mare in the bushes
ordered_events.quote: Gamzalo glances at it once

ordered_events.detail: Notes his horse is down, one less rein to hold
ordered_events.quote: My horse is down. Good. One less rein to hold.

ordered_events.detail: Glances at the dying mare, then the sun on a branch
ordered_events.quote: glances at the dying mare in the grass

ordered_events.detail: Says when sun clears the branch they go to the river
ordered_events.quote: When the sun clears that branch, we go to the river.

ordered_events.detail: Loads powder, passes long gun up, touches Hadji Murad's sleeve
ordered_events.quote: slaps powder into the pan, passes the long gun up

ordered_events.detail: Says he came to repay Hadji Murad's mother's milk
ordered_events.quote: Your mother's milk. I came to give it back. It is done.

ordered_events.detail: Gives Yusuf's silver coin to Khanefi to deliver
ordered_events.quote: presses it once, drops it into Khanefi's palm

ordered_events.detail: Instructs the coin go to the boy, no words needed
ordered_events.quote: this, to the boy. No words. He will read it.

ordered_events.detail: Draws both palms slowly down his beard
ordered_events.quote: He draws both palms slowly down his beard.

ordered_events.detail: Says Allah knows, it is well
ordered_events.quote: Allah knows. It is well.

ordered_events.detail: Rises, fires twice, wades out of the ditch into the open
ordered_events.quote: rises. He fires, fires again, wades up out of the ditch

ordered_events.detail: Struck down in the militia volley at the earth wall
ordered_events.quote: Eldar goes down at the earth wall

ordered_events.detail: Dragged back, pistol struck from his hand
ordered_events.quote: Khanefi is dragged back, his pistol struck from his hand

ordered_events.detail: Reaches a single tree, sets his shoulder to the trunk
ordered_events.quote: reaches a single tree and sets his shoulder to the trunk

ordered_events.detail: Wounded at his side, shoulder, and face
ordered_events.quote: Blood at his side, his shoulder, his face

ordered_events.detail: Fires until the rifle is empty, draws the dagger
ordered_events.quote: He fires until the rifle is empty, draws the dagger.

ordered_events.detail: Militia closes in, he collapses at the foot of the tree
ordered_events.quote: He goes down at the foot of the tree

ordered_events.detail: Calls out his son's name as he lies dying
ordered_events.quote: Yusuf...

ordered_events.detail: His hand searches the bark of the tree
ordered_events.quote: His hand searches the bark of the tree.

ordered_events.detail: Calls out to his mother, asks for the song
ordered_events.quote: Mother. The song.

ordered_events.detail: Ordered bound alive along with Khanefi and Gamzalo
ordered_events.quote: Bind them — Khanefi, Khan Mahoma, Gamzalo.

ordered_events.detail: Ordered bound alive along with Khanefi and Khan Mahoma
ordered_events.quote: Bind them — Khanefi, Khan Mahoma, Gamzalo.

ordered_events.detail: Murmurs of a horse, a black one
ordered_events.quote: A horse. A black one.

ordered_events.detail: Mocks the militia rolling the severed head like a melon
ordered_events.quote: they roll his head like a melon

ordered_events.detail: Body shudders, pushes once from the trunk
ordered_events.quote: Hadji Murad's body shudders. He pushes once from the trunk.

ordered_events.detail: Declares Hadji Murad has stood
ordered_events.quote: Hadji Murad has stood.

ordered_events.detail: Bound, leans toward the body, praying
ordered_events.quote: leans toward the body, jaw set, lips moving in prayer

ordered_events.detail: Vows he follows one step behind, as he swore
ordered_events.quote: Hadji Agha. I come. One step before. As I swore.

ordered_events.detail: Bound beside Gamzalo, sets his back to Gamzalo's
ordered_events.quote: sets his back to Gamzalo's

ordered_events.detail: Sings of Hamzad's grave and the avenger who did not sleep
ordered_events.quote: The earth dried on Hamzad's grave — the avenger did not sleep.

ordered_events.detail: Palms try to draw down the beard, then fall
ordered_events.quote: Hadji Murad's palms try to draw down the beard. They fall.

ordered_events.detail: Final words, Allah knows
ordered_events.quote: Allah knows.

ordered_events.detail: Dies at the foot of the tree
ordered_events.quote: He is still.

ordered_events.detail: Stiffens, looks away from the corpse
ordered_events.quote: stiffens, then looks away from the corpse

ordered_events.detail: Tells Khanefi to listen, says Allah is not impressed
ordered_events.quote: Quiet, Khanefi. Listen. The nightingales again. Allah is not impressed.

ordered_events.detail: Lifts bound hands toward the Russian line
ordered_events.quote: lifts his bound hands toward the Russian line

ordered_events.detail: Insists he rode beside Hadji Murad, demands it be recorded
ordered_events.quote: I rode beside him, you understand? Beside. Write that down somewhere, Russian.

ordered_events.detail: Drops the spent pistol, lifts both wrists to the militiaman
ordered_events.quote: Khanefi drops the spent pistol, lifts both wrists to the militiaman.

ordered_events.detail: Tells the militiaman to bind him, his hands are nothing now
ordered_events.quote: Bind me, dog. My hands are nothing now.

objects.detail: Khanefi slides it to Hadji Murad, powder confirmed dry
Cuts a branch with it, later drawn as the rifle empties
Khanefi passes it up loaded during the firefight
Khanefi sets the last flask within Hadji Murad's reach
Hadji Murad gives Yusuf's coin to Khanefi for the boy
Struck from his hand when captured; later drops the spent pistol
Fired repeatedly until empty during the final stand
Rolled aside with his foot after the beheading

counts.quote: Six men crouch behind the earth wall
Hadji Aga brings two hundred guests
HADJI MURAD, forty-seven, broad and still

injuries.injury: Shot dead while climbing to the bank
injuries.quote: A shot cracks. Bata pitches into the mud. Still.

injuries.injury: Struck down in the militia volley at the earth wall
injuries.quote: Eldar goes down at the earth wall

injuries.injury: Wounded at his side, shoulder, and face before falling
injuries.quote: Blood at his side, his shoulder, his face

injuries.injury: Dies at the foot of the tree

injuries.quote: Move the foot. Not the shoe — the head. Clean. Clean.
